name: AMBAR plasma exchange Alzheimer disease trial
summary: A randomized phase 2b/3 trial of repeated plasma exchange with albumin replacement, with or without intravenous immunoglobulin, for mild-to-moderate Alzheimer disease.

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Circulating Factor Modulation because they can show whether the intervention changes function and safety in People with mild-to-moderate Alzheimer disease. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
